headline: What Are Wall Street Analysts' Target Price for Deere & Company Stock?

headline: Deere Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: What to Expect for the Stock?
summary: DE braces for Q2 results, with earnings expected to fall 12.5% y/y despite higher revenues, as weak farm spending and rising costs weigh on the outlook.

headline: Wall Street's Insights Into Key Metrics Ahead of Deere (DE) Q2 Earnings
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Deere (DE), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended April 2026.

headline: Stocks Set to Open Lower as Oil Rises Amid Iran Impasse, Nvidia Earnings and Fed Minutes Awaited
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are down -0.41%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are down -0.30% this morning, pointing to a lower open on Wall Street as oil prices continue to rise amid the stalemate between the U.S. and Iran.
